<!-- source-hash: c51cd85e39f39b25ba0c42db1b6e7aeb -->
Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a single tag filter option with an associated device count, used in REST API responses for device filtering operations.

## Key Components

| Member | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `key` | `String` | The tag key (e.g., `"environment"`) |
| `value` | `String` | The tag value (e.g., `"production"`) |
| `count` | `Integer` | Number of devices matching this tag |

## Usage Example

```java
// Builder pattern
TagFilterItem filterItem = TagFilterItem.builder()
    .key("environment")
    .value("production")
    .count(15)
    .build();

// All-args constructor
TagFilterItem filterItem = new TagFilterItem("environment", "production", 15);

// Typical use in a filter list response
List<TagFilterItem> tagFilters = List.of(
    TagFilterItem.builder().key("environment").value("production").count(15).build(),
    TagFilterItem.builder().key("environment").value("staging").count(7).build(),
    TagFilterItem.builder().key("region").value("us-east-1").count(22).build()
);
```

## Notes

- Lombok annotations (`@Data`, `@Builder`, `@NoArgsConstructor`, `@AllArgsConstructor`) auto-generate getters, setters, constructors, and builder.
- OpenAPI `@Schema` annotations document each field for Swagger UI, making this DTO self-describing in the API spec.
- The `count` field enables UI components (e.g., filter sidebars) to display device tallies alongside each tag option.
